Results.PODetail_PartNum: Repairs to Air Con Units NTN 14022 & NTN 14021
Results.PODetail_LineDesc: Avica Aerospace NTN 14022 & NTN 14021 deep cleans required and unit falling from wall . This unit is suffering from reduced performance, due to a build-up of dirt on internal surfaces & components (fan impeller, heat exchanger coil, drip tray etc.) that are inaccessible during routine maintenance procedures. Description of repair(s) The unit would be isolated, & fully stripped down to allow access to normally inaccessible areas. Carry out a chemical deep clean of the heat exchanger, louvres, drip tray & all accessible internal airways. The unit would be reassembled, checked & tested. The unit NTN 14021 is falling from the wall and requires reattaching
